id.description: Unique identifier for the feature highlights component, used by the generic components framework (ComponentsGenericApiModel) to match and resolve this configuration block. Accepted values: any non-empty string. Changing it will prevent the component from being matched to its screen slot, causing the feature highlights section to not render.

items.description: Ordered list of individual feature highlight entries displayed vertically in a LinearLayout (FeatureHighlightsView). Accepted values: an array of feature highlight item objects; null or missing results in an empty list. Changing the number of entries adds or removes rows from the feature highlights section on the offer screen.

icon_url.description: URL of the icon image displayed to the left of the highlight text, loaded via loadImage() into a 24×24 dp ImageView. Accepted values: any valid image URL string; null or empty hides nothing but skips the image load. Changing it swaps the icon shown next to the feature title and subtitle.

subtitle.description: Text configuration for the secondary description line rendered below the title using Typography.T9 and FontWeights.REGULAR. Accepted values: an object with text and color fields; null or empty text causes the subtitle PicsartTextView to be hidden (GONE). Changing it updates the secondary descriptive text and its color for this highlight row.

color.description: Color path string resolved via CascadeColorPackage.getColorOrPackageBy() to set the subtitle text color, falling back to PositiveColors.base.default if the path is empty or invalid. Accepted values: a CascadeColorPackage path string (e.g. a design-token path) or an empty string for the default color. Changing it alters the subtitle text color for this highlight item.

new_field.description: Not consumed in current source code — changing it has no visible effect.

text.description: The subtitle string displayed in the PicsartTextView below the title, rendered with Typography.T9 and FontWeights.REGULAR. Accepted values: any string; null or empty causes the subtitle view to be hidden (GONE). Changing it updates the secondary description text shown for this highlight item.

title.description: Text configuration for the primary label rendered with Typography.T8 and FontWeights.SEMI_BOLD next to the icon. Accepted values: an object with text and color fields; null or empty text causes the title PicsartTextView to be hidden (GONE). Changing it updates the primary feature name and its color for this highlight row.

color.description: Color path string resolved via CascadeColorPackage.getColorOrPackageBy() to set the title text color, falling back to PositiveColors.base.default if the path is empty or invalid. Accepted values: a CascadeColorPackage path string (e.g. a design-token path) or an empty string for the default color. Changing it alters the title text color for this highlight item.

new_field.description: Not consumed in current source code — changing it has no visible effect.

text.description: The title string displayed in the PicsartTextView as the primary feature name, rendered with Typography.T8 and FontWeights.SEMI_BOLD. Accepted values: any string; null or empty causes the title view to be hidden (GONE). Changing it updates the feature name shown for this highlight item.

action.description: A deep-link or URL that is opened via HookUtils.openHookDirect when the user taps the footer text. Accepted values: any valid deep-link URI or web URL string that the app's HookUtils can resolve. If this field is set to a non-empty value, the footer becomes tappable and navigates to the specified destination; if empty or null, the footer is displayed as static, non-clickable text.

id.description: Unique identifier for this footer component, used by the Optimus transformable component system to match and resolve footer instances within the offer screen configuration. Accepted values: any unique non-empty string. Changing this value affects which footer entry the component resolver selects; an unrecognized id may cause the footer to not appear on screen.

text.description: Text configuration object that controls the displayed footer label and its color. The mapper extracts the inner text and color fields into a TextConfig entity. If this object is null or its inner text is empty, the footer view is hidden (visibility GONE) on both the full and half offer screens.

color.description: Color token path resolved via CascadeColorPackage.getColorOrPackageBy to determine the footer text color, with a default fallback of BackgroundColors.tint3. Accepted values: a valid CascadeColorPackage path string (e.g., a design-system semantic color token). Changing this value alters the footer text color on the offer screen; if empty, the default tint3 background color is used.

new_field.description: Not consumed in current source code — changing it has no visible effect.

text.description: The user-visible footer string displayed in a centered 12sp TextView below the radio buttons on the offer screen. Accepted values: any non-empty string. If this field is empty or null, the entire footer view is hidden (visibility GONE); setting it to a non-empty value makes the footer visible with this text content.

width.description: Specifies the desired display width of the logo image in density-independent pixels (dp), converted to physical pixels at render time. Accepted values: positive integers representing dp units. If changed, the logo ImageView's layout width is updated accordingly; if omitted (null) along with height, the ImageView uses its default wrap_content sizing.

id.description: Unique identifier for this logo component, used to match remote configuration data to screen layout parameters via componentId lookup in OptimusScreenRepoImpl. Accepted values: any non-empty string that corresponds to a configured component ID in the Optimus screen params. If changed, the logo component may fail to resolve its remote data, causing the logo to not render on the offer screen.

url.description: The URL of the logo image to display on the Optimus offer screen, loaded via the app's image loader into the logo ImageView. Accepted values: any valid image URL string (e.g., HTTPS URL pointing to a PNG, SVG, or WebP asset). If changed, the displayed logo image changes; if empty or omitted, the logo ImageView is hidden (visibility set to GONE).

height.description: Specifies the desired display height of the logo image in density-independent pixels (dp), converted to physical pixels at render time. Accepted values: positive integers representing dp units. If changed, the logo ImageView's layout height is updated accordingly; if omitted (null) along with width, the ImageView uses its default wrap_content sizing.

only_pro_content_id.description: References an alternative content_id from 'optimus_screen_content' to display when the user is a pro-only subscriber (showOnlyProScreen=true). Accepted values: a string matching a content_id in the optimus_screen_content settings array. Changing this value redirects pro-only users to a different single-screen offer layout, bypassing the tabbed experience.

screen_name.description: Unique identifier used to match this screen configuration to the contentVariant passed when opening the offer screen. Accepted values: any string; the code looks up an exact match against the incoming screenName parameter, falling back to 'default' if no match is found. Changing this value alters which entry point (touchpoint) resolves to this configuration; it is also emitted as the offerVariantAnalytics value for analytics tracking.

content_id.description: References a single screen definition in 'optimus_screen_content' to render as a non-tabbed offer screen. Accepted values: a non-empty string matching a content_id in optimus_screen_content. When set, the app treats this entry as a single-screen layout and ignores the tabs array; removing or emptying it causes the app to fall back to tabbed mode (if tabs has more than one item).

tabs.description: Defines the list of tab configurations for the CycleSwitcherView tab switcher displayed on the offer screen. Accepted values: an array of tab objects; if the array contains exactly one item the app treats it as a single screen, and if it contains more than one item the app renders a tabbed experience. Changing the number or content of tabs reconfigures how many tabs appear and which offer content is loaded for each tab.

badge.description: Text displayed on the badge overlay within the tab switcher (e.g. a promotional label). Accepted values: any string; an empty string results in no badge being shown. Changing this value updates the badge label rendered on the tab in CycleSwitcherView via CycleBadgeView.

visible.description: Not consumed in current source code — changing it has no visible effect.

selected_text_color.description: CascadeColorPackage color path applied to the tab title text when this tab is in the selected state. Accepted values: a string color path resolved by CascadeColorPackage.getColorOrPackageBy(). Changing this value updates the text color of the selected tab label in CycleSwitcherView.

background_color.description: CascadeColorPackage color path used as the background color of this tab when it is selected. Accepted values: a string color path resolved by CascadeColorPackage.getColorOrPackageBy(). Changing this value alters the selected tab's background color in CycleSwitcherView.

deselected_text_color.description: CascadeColorPackage color path applied to the tab title text when this tab is not selected. The 'addition' field value is appended to this string before resolution. Accepted values: a string color path resolved by CascadeColorPackage.getColorOrPackageBy(). Changing this value updates the text color of the tab label when the tab is in the unselected state.

content_id.description: References a screen definition in 'optimus_screen_content' whose components are loaded when this tab is selected. Also used as the unique identifier (id) for this tab in the CycleSwitcherData and the key in the tabScreensList map. Accepted values: a string matching a content_id in the optimus_screen_content settings array. Changing this value changes which offer screen content is displayed when the user selects this tab.

show_unselected_state_badge.description: Controls whether the badge is displayed on this tab even when it is not selected. Accepted values: true or false. When true, the badge (with an unselected background style) remains visible on the non-active tab; when false, the badge is hidden on the unselected tab.

title.description: Display text shown as the tab label in the CycleSwitcherView. Accepted values: any string. Changing this value updates the visible text on the tab in the tab switcher UI.

gradient_type.description: Determines which gradient drawable is used as the badge background in CycleBadgeView. Accepted values: 'plus' (resolves to R.drawable.user_plus) or 'pro' (resolves to R.drawable.user_pro). Changing this value switches the badge's gradient style between the Plus and Pro visual treatments.

selected.description: Indicates whether this tab should be the initially selected tab when the offer screen loads. Accepted values: true or false. Setting this to true causes the CycleSwitcherView to render this tab in the selected state on first display and load its corresponding screen content.

addition.description: A string that is concatenated to the end of deselected_text_color before the combined value is resolved as a color path. Accepted values: any string suffix for a CascadeColorPackage color path. Changing this value modifies the final color path used for the deselected tab text color.

tabs_bg_color.description: CascadeColorPackage color path used as the background color of the entire CycleSwitcherView tab bar container. Accepted values: a string color path resolved by CascadeColorPackage. Changing this value updates the background color behind all tabs in the tab switcher.

tree.role: Entry point for the Optimus subscription offer screen, observes ViewModel state and renders UI components

children.role: Manages Optimus screen UI state, fetches screen data via use case and emits flows for screen content and tabs
Interface defining the contract to fetch Optimus screen data with tab support
Implements use case by fetching repo data, resolving package prices, and building radio button text
Interface for fetching raw Optimus screen configuration from remote settings
Fetches Optimus screen JSON from RemoteSettings, parses components by ID, and maps API models to OptimusEntity
@FeatureStart — JSON data model representing a single Optimus screen's component references from remote config
JSON model for root-level Optimus config containing tab definitions and screen name routing
Base interface for all component API models, providing an id field for lookup
Resolves subscription package info, applies promotions, and generates button text with pricing
Fetches and maps subscription package list from remote settings
Interface for replacing special price characters in subscription text with actual package prices
Interface for launching the subscription purchase activity
Implements subscription purchase flow by resolving the shop activity class and starting it
Tracks subscription analytics events including offer open, button click, and secondary actions
Interface for creating subscription half-screen dialog fragments
Creates half-screen and tiers half-screen dialog fragment instances
